detail.description:
Welcome to Card Story! A fun and challenging game that combines memory, observation, and logic skills. Not only is it engaging, but you can also earn real rewards!

In this game, you’ll complete various puzzle challenges to unlock treasure chests, earn coins, and collect cards. Use your wits and patience to conquer levels, complete card sets, and discover exciting surprises!

Gameplay Highlights
